text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
What an epicurean feast! I doff my cap to
whoever cooked up this mille-feuille.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed... The hints of brandy in the crust gave it a
real depth. It paired very nicely with my coffee.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Something on your mind?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
No... I merely noticed that your expression has
softened.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
When Teio told me about the new items on the
menu here, I thought of you.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I'm glad it is to your taste. I trust some of your
fatigue has lifted?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...It appears that I've caused you some concern.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you were able to discern my fatigue so easily,
then I still have much to learn. I'll see to it that
this doesn't happen again.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove, I don't know what I would do if
something were to happen to you. Please don't
try to hide these things from me.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I appreciate the concern, but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Hm.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Shall we go for a short stroll, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Though the sun sinks low in the sky, its warmth is
still strong in the evening air.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Um, President—

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
You are quite like the sun, you know. A blazing
symbol shining bright for all Umamusume to see.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
If I may continue the metaphor, I wish to be like
the earth. The verdant soil of happiness upon
which their dreams may sprout.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
These new dreams witness hope in the light of the
sun—and as they reach toward it, they grow their
stalks and finally flower.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
With you as the sun and me as the earth, we shall
achieve our dreams and create a paradise for all
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
We are two unique individuals with differing
strengths. Don't look down on yourself just
because I possess something you do not.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Thank you. I'll keep that in mind.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The presidents ambitions are great, and her
outlook is vast. She always stands out as a shining
example to aspire to.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Whenever she encourages me, I start to rely on
her, and I find myself wanting to agree with
everything she says...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But... I have to do better!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove quietly tells me about the previous
day's events. As she finishes, a fierce
determination starts to burn in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I... do want to be like the sun. But on one
condition...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I want to be a sun that captivates even the great
earth and makes it yearn to reach into the sky!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I can't very well call myself the Empress if I'm only
chasing after the Emperor's coattails!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's get to work, Trainer! There are heights I
have yet to reach!
choice_data_list: We'll dazzle them all with your signature move!
We'll dazzle them all with your signature move!
For you, I'll become a universe-level trainer!
For you, I'll become a universe-level trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's get to work, Trainer! There are heights I
have yet to reach!
choice_data_list: We'll dazzle them all with your signature move!
We'll dazzle them all with your signature move!
For you, I'll become a universe-level trainer!
For you, I'll become a universe-level trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: My signature move? Heh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No matter who tries to block my path, I'll come
out victorious in the end!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Don't take your eyes off me—not even for a
second.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The Empress will dazzle everyone with her famous
last-minute burst of speed!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Uh...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
O-oh, right, I see now... Because I'm the sun.
Right.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh... You really lost me there for a second, haha!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the laugh. I feel a lot less tense
now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Let's get back to business. Today is another step
forward in pursuit of my ideals.
